summary: Iteration 56 - Avatar 360° Generation & Gemini Edit Image Fix. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all expected UI elements and flows.

BACKEND_1_generate_avatar_with_source_im.details: Uses _gemini_edit_image function (line 2867) to send text+image in SAME multimodal message via litellm.completion to Gemini. No 'images' or 'base64_data' keyword argument errors.

BACKEND_2_generate_avatar_without_source.details: Falls back to LlmChat with UserMessage when no source_image_url provided (lines 2883-2890)

BACKEND_3_generate_avatar_variant.details: Uses _gemini_edit_image for clothing and angle changes when source_image_url provided (line 3202)

BACKEND_4_generate_avatar_360_batch.details: Starts background batch job for 4 angles, returns job_id immediately. Uses threading.Thread with _run_batch_360.

BACKEND_5_get_avatar_360_status.details: Returns status with completed count and results dict. Polls _batch360_jobs in-memory store.

BACKEND_6_auth_required_all_endpoints.details: generate-avatar, generate-avatar-variant, generate-avatar-360, get-avatar-360-status all require authentication (401/403 without token)

FRONTEND_1_startAuto360_function.details: startAuto360 function calls POST /generate-avatar-360, then polls GET /generate-avatar-360/{job_id} every 6 seconds, updates auto360Progress state

FRONTEND_2_auto360_after_avatar_generati.details: startAuto360 called after generateAvatarFromPhoto completes successfully

FRONTEND_3_auto360_after_clothing_change.details: startAuto360 called after applyClothingStyle changes clothing

FRONTEND_4_progress_bar_ui.details: Progress bar appears in view360 tab showing completion count (X/4) with animated progress bar

FRONTEND_5_video_tab_left_best_badge.details: Video tab positioned LEFT (x=726), Photo tab RIGHT (x=960). Video tab has 'BEST' badge and is selected by default.

keys_verified: studio.angles_generated (en: '360° generated!', pt: '360° gerado com sucesso!', es: '360° generado!')

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56: _gemini_edit_image function (line 30) sends text+image in SAME multimodal message to Gemini via litellm.completion with emergent proxy. generate-avatar and generate-avatar-variant use this for image editing. generate-avatar-360 batch endpoint starts background job for 4 angles with polling. Frontend startAuto360 function triggers automatically after avatar generation and clothing changes. Translation keys auto_generating_360 and angles_generated exist in all 3 locales.

_gemini_edit_image_function.description: Sends text+image in SAME message via litellm.completion to fix identity preservation issue
